This is a testharness.js-based test.

[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 2D tensor by eliminating one dimension
[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 3D tensor by eliminating one dimension

[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 4D tensor by eliminating two dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 4D tensor by eliminating all dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 5D tensor by eliminating four dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 2D tensor by eliminating 1st dimension
[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 3D tensor by eliminating 2nd and 3rd dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 4D tensor by eliminating 1st and 4th dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 5D tensor by eliminating 2nd and 3rd dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (squeeze) float32 5D tensor by eliminating 1st, 2nd and 5th dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (unsqueeze) float32 0D tensor to 4D
[NOTRUN] reshape (unsqueeze) float32 1D tensor by adding one dimension
[NOTRUN] reshape (unsqueeze) float32 1D tensor by adding two dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (unsqueeze) float32 1D tensor to 5D
[NOTRUN] reshape (unsqueeze) float32 1D tensor by adding 2nd and 3rd dimensions
[NOTRUN] reshape (unsqueeze) float32 2D tensor by adding one dimension
